subject: [POLICY] Release Policy-clamp 6.1.1
commit_message:
[POLICY] Release Policy-clamp 6.1.1

Update the version to 6.1.1
+ required config changes due to Camel
& Spring upgrades & Sonar fixes

Issue-ID: POLICY-3224
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I7cf2caff461b88326d3ec90c9eea0fd6711f16e5

Patch Set 2:

Hello, as soon as jobbuilder is +1 (line too long is fixed) I’m OK to merge. 
Although I’ve got a question for the « future »: is it simple to remove all AAF stuff in Clamp as we all know that we want to remove it from ONAP as it’s not maintained anymore?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> Hello, as soon as jobbuilder is +1 (line too long is fixed) I’m OK to merge. 
> Although I’ve got a question for the « future »: is it simple to remove all AAF stuff in Clamp as we all know that we want to remove it from ONAP as it’s not maintained anymore?

Yeah we could, but we need to track that in a user story because it's not that simple ...
